description: In the on-call runbook, move the complete `Pager Rotation Review` subsection from under `Alert Triage` to under `Shift Handoff`, placing it immediately after `Shift Closeout Checklist` and before `Follow-up Queue`. Preserve the moved subsection exactly, including its table, checklist, and fenced YAML snippet. Leave the `Pager Rotation Exceptions` decoy heading and the quoted archive mention of `### Pager Rotation Review` untouched.
